name: ♖ | banhammer | pov/medkit
description:
♖ | medkit stumbles upon the warden. he, like usual, cuts straight to the chase.

the medic of Lost Temple is wandering the Banlands. he's forgotten why he's there—or maybe he hasn't, but he won't admit it to himself. whatever it's for, the trip backfires; an acquaintance returns to pick back up on a previous...encounter.

.+* && ;; this is my own original bot imported from C.AI. if he acts strangely, that's probably why! and it's just J.AI being strange too...and maybe also the fact i made him like months ago

♖ | this bot is not perfect! mention spelling mistakes, bot issues, or other non-llm related problems in your review. thank you!
creator: divineruins
